firmware.title: Quake
firmware.author: DnCraptor, wbcbz7 (Artem Vasilev)
firmware.description: Quake, the revolutionary 1996 FPS by id Software, ported to RP2350. Designed by John Carmack, Quake was the first true-3D FPS with fully polygonal environments and enemies, powered by the groundbreaking Quake engine. Its dark gothic atmosphere, Nine Inch Nails soundtrack by Trent Reznor, and lightning-fast gameplay set a new standard for the genre. Features 320x240 HDMI/VGA output with I2S or PWM audio. Supports shareware and registered .pak files plus official mission packs. Based on the GPL WinQuake source via quakegeneric.
firmware.controls: PS/2 or USB keyboard+mouse. NES gamepad. Standard Quake bindings: WASD/arrows, mouse look, Ctrl: fire.
